_comment: Governor Josh Stein's FY2026-27 Budget tax proposals. Applied to the reform simulation (baseline receives baseline_adjustments.json). Provisions: (1) maintain 3.99% individual income tax rate in 2027 and 2028 (repealing triggered reductions), (2) raise standard deduction starting 2027 (+$1,000 JOINT/SURVIVING_SPOUSE, +$750 HEAD_OF_HOUSEHOLD, +$500 SINGLE/SEPARATE), (3) establish refundable Working Families Tax Credit = 10% of federal EITC starting 2026, (4) establish refundable child and dependent care tax credit = 30% of federal CDCC starting 2026. Sales Tax Back-to-School Holiday and maintenance of 2% corporate rate are not modeled.
